case_title: JUSTIN ANGELO QUADRA HERINGER VS. MARK ZIMMELMAN ET AL
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD (TRANSACTION ID # 210069293) FILED BY PETITIONER QUADRA HERINGER, JUSTIN ANGELO AS TO RESPONDENT ZIMMELMAN, MARK CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210069293) FILED BY PETITIONER QUADRA HERINGER, JUSTIN ANGELO

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE APRIL-29-2024 HEARING RE: PETITIONER JUSTIN QUADRA HERINGER'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-29-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. GABRIEL LEE SANCHEZ, Esq. of Keesal, Young & Logan (tel: 415-398-6000) for Petitioner.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER JUSTIN QUADRA HERINGER's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
